name: Ultrawide 21:9
description: Renders Rain World at a true 21:9 internal resolution (1792x768 by default) instead of the stock 16:9 presets. You see more of each room horizontally, with no pixel stretching. Width is configurable in BepInEx/config/kai.ultrawide219.cfg (1792 = 21:9, 2560 ~= 32:9).
